acceptedIds: New Hampshire driver's license or non-driver ID
Any government-issued photo ID showing name and address
exceptions: Voters without qualifying ID may sign an affidavit of identity and vote. A poll worker may challenge the affidavit. Voter will be photographed if using the affidavit.
provisionalBallotRules: Voters may cast a challenged ballot, which is set aside pending verification.
phonesAtPollsDetail: Phones are permitted but recording marked ballots is prohibited.
